prestazioni: Engine: 2.0L 8V turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: 831A5.000) with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (84.5mm bore, 9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a fully balanced crankshaft by JE Motorsport. Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GT2860RS-5 with a 0.64 A/R turbine housing and 56 trim compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Janspeed Engineering and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) peak pressure.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the front differential (replacing the stock Torsen) and a 2.5-way Cusco Type-RS LSD in the rear, coupled with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) and a Group A-spec reinforced gearbox with close-ratio gears (1st: 2.923, 2nd: 1.944, 3rd: 1.370, 4th: 1.029, 5th: 0.833) by Hewland. Final drive ratio set to 4.389 for optimal acceleration.

Suspension & Braking: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-way adjustable damping and 20mm adjustable ride height, paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (25% stiffer than OEM). Front and rear anti-roll bars upgraded to SuperPro adjustable units (24mm front, 18mm rear). Braking system features Alcon 4-piston calipers with 330mm two-piece rotors (front) and 2-piston calipers with 280mm rotors (rear), using Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines by Goodridge.
estetica: Bodywork: Full Group A-inspired widebody conversion using a Delta HF Integrale Evo II OEM-style fiberglass kit by Zender (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper), with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny. Hood replaced with a carbon fiber unit from Seibon with a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling.

Aerodynamics: Custom rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1200mm width, 300mm chord) mounted on aluminum pedestals, paired with a front canard set by APR Performance. Side skirts replaced with OEM-style Evo II units, extended to match the widebody fenders. Underbody features a full-length aluminum diffuser by APR with integrated vortex generators.

Wheels & Styling: 17x9.5 ET15 front and 17x10.5 ET5 rear wheels by BBS LM (gold finish, 5x98 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear). OEM-style Recaro SRD seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter) and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in, with integrated harness bar).
